name: Stroganoff Bundles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Of a 17 1/4 oz pkg frozen puff pastry, 1 sheet, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1 In a skillet cook beef, green pepper, onion, and carrot till meat is brown and onion is tender; drain off fat.
2 Combine 1/2 cup of the sour cream, flour, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt. Stir into meat mixture.
3 Roll puff pastry into an 18x12 inch rectangle.
4 Cut into six 6-inch squares.
5 Spoon about 1/6 of the filling into the center of each square.
6 Moisten edges of squares.
7 Fold all 4 corners of each square to center.
8 Seal edges by crimping.
9 Place in an ungreased shallow baking pan.
10 Bake in a 375°F oven about 25 minutes or till golden.
11 Meanwhile, make the sauce. Combine the soup and remaining sour cream. Heat through over low heat.
12 Spoon sauce over bundles.
